statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd'); project=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.project_dir'); ctx_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage'); if [ "$ctx_pct" -lt 50 ]; then ctx_icon='✓'; elif [ "$ctx_pct" -lt 60 ]; then ctx_icon='→'; elif [ "$ctx_pct" -lt 80 ]; then ctx_icon='◇'; else ctx_icon='✕'; fi; if [ "$cwd" = "$project" ]; then rel_path=$(basename "$project"); else rel_path=$(echo "$cwd" | sed "s|^$project|...|"); fi; cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null; branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo '-'); dirty=''; [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && dirty=' ✗'; printf '%s | %s%s | %s%% %s' "$rel_path" "$branch" "$dirty" "$ctx_pct" "$ctx_icon"
